title: Shinjis pre NGE residence
wikitext:
[]: Shinji's pre-NGE residence             Quote Post by Allemann » Mon Aug 03, 2009 3:26 pm I which city did Shinji live with his teacher before the storyline started?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Aug 03, 2009 5:00 pm Manga vol 1 page 11 -- address given as Mr Shinji Ikari Nakamachi 24-1-6 <<-- I think Masashino Tokyo 180

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Aug 03, 2009 5:36 pm It seems like that the relatives in the manga or the teacher in the anime didn't care that much about Shinji since they never contacted him since he left. Either that or NERV is making sure that they don't have contact him for some reason.

chunks.content:
Article: Shinjis pre NGE residence
[]: Shinji's pre-NGE residence             Quote Post by Allemann » Mon Aug 03, 2009 3:26 pm I which city did Shinji live with his teacher before the storyline started?

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Mon Aug 03, 2009 5:00 pm Manga vol 1 page 11 -- address given as Mr Shinji Ikari Nakamachi 24-1-6 <<-- I think Masashino Tokyo 180

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Mon Aug 03, 2009 5:36 pm It seems like that the relatives in the manga or the teacher in the anime didn't care that much about Shinji since they never contacted him since he left. Either that or NERV is making sure that they don't have contact him for some reason.
